title: rudua mungo
intro: Rudua mungo, also known as the Mung Bean or Green Gram, is a type of legume native to India and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Rudua mungo lie in its high protein content, fiber, and various vitamins and minerals, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rudua mungo include reducing the risk of heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer, as well as supporting digestive health and weight management. Rudua mungo is often prepared as a herbal tea or added to soups and stews, and its sprouted form is a popular ingredient in salads and stir-fries.
